ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE COURT'S REVIEW IS GOVERNED BY AN ABUSE OF DISCRETION STANDARD. AS TO THE CHOICE OF THE SECONDARY RFP PROCESS, THAT OPTION WAS GIVEN BY THE STATUTE TO THE RESPONDENT. THEREFORE, THE EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD SUPPORTS THAT CHOICE AS BEING WITHIN THE DISCRETION OF THE RESPONDENT. THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT THERE IS NO ABUSE OF DISCRETION AS TO THE RESPONDENT KNOWING THE IDENTITY OF THE PROPOSED BIDDERS. RESPONDENT IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Order To Show Cause Re: Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. GEORGE W. WOLFF & ATTY. KRISTIN KORN, TEL. NO. 788-1881 ext. 222 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. ANTHONY HAKL, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (916) 322-9041 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT CDCR & DGS;
ATTY. CHRISTOPHER KEELE OF THE KEELE GROUP, TEL. NO. 308-8466 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT TOTAL RENAL CARE;
ATTY. MICHAEL S. WINSTEN OF THE WINSTEN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (949) 633-5458 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT TOTAL RENAL CARE;
ATTY. FELIX LOYA, TEL. NO. (626) 792-8100 APPEARING FOR THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST QUEENS DIALYSIS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; Order To Show Cause Regarding Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate is Denied. THE COURT'S REVIEW IS GOVERNED BY AN ABUSE OF DISCRETION STANDARD. AS TO THE CHOICE OF THE SECONDARY RFP PROCESS, THAT OPTION WAS GIVEN BY THE STATUTE TO THE RESPONDENT. THEREFORE, THE EVIDENCE IN THE RECORD SUPPORTS THAT CHOICE AS BEING WITHIN THE DISCRETION OF THE RESPONDENT. THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT THERE IS NO ABUSE OF DISCRETION AS TO THE RESPONDENT KNOWING THE IDENTITY OF THE PROPOSED BIDDERS. Respondent is to submit a proposed form of order. PER DIEM FEES ASSESSED BY THE COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
